name: Portage Salarial - Single filer, median revenue
description: Consultant earning €50,000 annual revenue through portage salarial company (8% fee), net after fee and all deductions

sources.description: Verified using official French tax formula with portage salarial (8% fee). Revenue: €50k. Portage fee: €4,000. Gross after fee: €46k. Social contributions and income tax calculated on €46k. Taxable income: €38,326.74. Tax on quotient: €4,602.01.
